response.justification: Bogdan has strong full-stack engineering experience, entrepreneurial initiative with GISCollective, and deep technical fluency across languages and systems, but lacks explicit AI/ML product leadership, cloud platform strategy experience, and formal AI credentials — key requirements for this principal engineer role focused on AI strategy at director level.
strengths: Proven entrepreneurial drive with open-source AI-adjacent platform (GISCollective)
Extensive full-stack and systems engineering across cloud-native and low-latency environments
Strong technical communication via workshops and public contributions
concerns: No demonstrated AI/ML product development or platform ownership
Missing advanced degree or recognized expertise in AI/ML fields
Limited evidence of strategic cloud product roadmapping or customer advisory experience
